nodes.label: A 2-row GLADE-2-shaped DataFrame: one populated, one missing Kmag.
End-to-end CLI smoke: targets YAML -> mocked cone_query -> ranked CSV + summary
A target whose TAP query returns zero rows must still appear in the summary.
Host-confusion regression: a candidate at small theta + small dz from     the FR
Spec-z catalog rows must use a tighter dz tolerance than photo/unknown.      Two
The CLI's tail warning lines must reflect the resolved summary status.      A si
Targets without a host redshift must produce status='z_frb_unknown'     and zero
A sightline whose cone hits maxrec must be tagged status='possibly_truncated'.
